summary: Comprehensive testing of Aqua Quest underwater Mario-style game. All core features working correctly - backend APIs, title screen, game canvas, HUD, player movement, enemies, pause, arcade mode, and leaderboard integration.

issues: Canvas2D willReadFrequently warning - not a bug but minor performance optimization opportunity: add willReadFrequently:true to getContext('2d') calls that use getImageData

critical_code_review_comments: Canvas getContext calls may benefit from willReadFrequently:true attribute if using getImageData for pixel reads (browser console warning observed)
seed_data_creation: 3 leaderboard test entries created during testing (TEST01, ARCPLR, TOOLLO)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified: title screen with AQUA QUEST logo + STORY/ARCADE buttons, game canvas with HUD (SCORE/LIVES/TIME), diver player character, coins, enemies (cheep-cheeps, jellyfish, bloopers visible), underwater background with seaweed/bubbles, pause screen with P key, arcade mode working, leaderboard API POST/GET working. Game over screen code reviewed - looks correct but not live-tested (would require player death). 3 levels + arcade level data all defined correctly.
